name: insurance brokers managing 5–15 policies/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 policies/month, missed policy renewals cause coverage gaps. We monitor renewals instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: missed policy renewals leading to coverage gaps
